index.title: Welcome to My Portfolio
index.description: Working with technology and studying software solutions since 2020.

education.text: Graduated from the best federal institutions in Brazil, actively working on technological innovation and extension projects under the guidance of highly qualified professionals. I have a technical degree in systems development from IFRS and am currently pursuing a Computer Engineering degree at UFRGS together with INF (Institute of Informatics).

experience.description1: I am a web developer with over 3 years of experience building applications that serve thousands of users. I work in web and mobile development using technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, React Native, PHP and MySQL.
experience.description2: I was active during my technical training in research and technological innovation projects, initiatives like Revisão Online and Curador Virtual. More recently I had the opportunity to work professionally as a development consultant on applications such as Arcrit and MDI, improving design and functionality.

revisaoonline.title: Revisão Online
revisaoonline.description: RevisãoOnline is one of the leading free ENEM essay correction sites. The platform follows the MVC model, built with PHP (backend), MySQL (database), and a frontend stack of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

arcrit.title: Arcrit
arcrit.description: Arcrit is a gamified platform for urban architectural discovery and evaluation. The tech stack features a React/Next.js frontend and a Firebase backend for real-time data and authentication.

mdi.title: MDI: My Data Importer
mdi.description: MDI is a platform integrated with Moodle that enables users to analyze large volumes of data through various tools. The application was developed using React, PostgreSQL, and Python for AI services.

curadorvirtual.title: Curador Virtual
curadorvirtual.description: Curador Virtual is a web application that allows users to discover and create works of art. The application was developed using React for specific components and a backend powered by the Enyalius Framework.

about.description1: I am a web developer with over 3 years of experience building applications that serve thousands of users. I consider myself a professional who seeks to expand knowledge and engage with the community around me, participating in workshops, trainings, and technology‑focused courses.
about.description2: Besides working with modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js and Python, I also have experience with well‑established tools such as PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS and JavaScript. I am always looking to learn new technologies and improve my skills to deliver high‑quality solutions.

contact.description1: If you want to get in touch with me, whether to discuss job opportunities, collaborate on projects, or simply chat about technology, feel free to send me an email or find me on social media. I am always open to new connections and learning opportunities.

footer.about: Built with NextJs, Typescript and TailwindCSS.
